title: MCP: A USB-C Port for AI
summary: AI apps used to need custom integrations for every tool. The Model Context Protocol replaces much of that complexity with a shared standard connector.

context.headline: One port, any tool
context.description: Before MCP, every AI app often needed a custom integration for every tool. The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that lets AI applications talk to tools through a shared connector pattern. It reduces repeated integration work and makes tool ecosystems easier to build and reuse.
context.when: The emerging standard for connecting AI to everything
